heading: Federal share
label: 10616 Federal share
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 3797u–5 of Title 42

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Federal share of a grant made under this subchapter may not exceed 75 percent of the total costs of the program described in the application submitted under for the fiscal year for which the program receives assistance under this subchapter, unless the Attorney General waives, wholly or in part, the requirement of a matching contribution under this section.section 10615 of this title

children.heading: In-kind contributions
children.label: b In-kind contributions
children.text: In-kind contributions may constitute a portion of the non-Federal share of a grant.
